case_title: CHIOCCO THOMAS K VS RALPH DAVIES MEN AND WOMEN INC A CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,700.00 FILED BY CHIOCCO THOMAS K AS TO DEFENDANT RALPH DAVIES MEN AND WOMEN INC A CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIOCCO THOMAS K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RALPH DAVIES MEN AND WOMEN INC A CORPORATION $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28.00, DEFT.MUST FILE ALL NECESSARY PAPER FOR PLT'S WORKER'S COMP.WITHIN 5 DAYS OF DATE OF THIS ORDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
